behavior_summary: This script implements the U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit handler for a web object. When the web is struck, it records a short piece of metadata (set-info with id 0x020C) tied to the object, marks/excludes processing for that target (process exclude), and then destroys the web instance.
The routine acts as a one-shot cleanup: record hit context, prevent further processing, and remove the web from the world.
notable_control_flow: On entry (Event 6 - U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit) the handler pushes constant 0x020C and the web item reference, executes a 'set info' opcode to store hit metadata, then runs a 'process exclude' opcode, and finally calls Item::destroy on the web instance before returning.
There are no loops or conditionals observed — the sequence is linear and always proceeds to destroy the item.
open_questions: What is the semantic meaning of info id 0x020C (what data or game-state does it represent)?
Does 'process exclude' prevent other handlers from running on this object or only change internal processing flags? (inferred but not explicit)
Is the second parameter (word arg2) used elsewhere or intended for future logic (it is not referenced in the visible instructions)?

main_function.name: U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit' event for the web object: record hit-related info on a referenced target and then destroy the web object to remove it from the game world.
entry_conditions: Event 6 (U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit) — triggered when the object is struck/hit

function_map.name: U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit
function_map.role: Event handler for hit/damage on the web object; records info and destroys the instance.

external_calls.purpose: Remove/destroy the web item instance from the world (cleanup of the hit web).
Attach/record metadata identified by constant 0x020C to the referenced object (stores hit context or flags).
Exclude the referenced object from further processing or alter its processing state (prevents additional handlers/AI from running on it).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the U8P_EWBIGWEB::gotHit handler for a web object. When the web is struck, it records a short piece of metadata (set-info with id 0x020C) tied to the object, marks/excludes processing for that target (process exclude), and then destroys the web instance.
